data.body: POST-CLOSE (test-quality pass, commit 813dd5c8): added the actual BOUNDED guarantee test (max_concurrency upper bound never exceeded, peak==bound saturation) + a sharper failure assertion (frame key + cause). Note: the resolution-error fix on the interpreter (see dbc6) was the v1-contract regression introduced by moving with-resolution under this story's rc.lock guard — now fixed.
